title: EXTENSION CONSENT LETTER
text_head:
To: OGE Energy Corp., as Borrower
From: Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., as Administrative Agent
Date: December 10, 2024

Reference is made to the Credit Agreement dated as of August 15, 2021. The Administrative Agent is soliciting the consent of the Bank Group to extend the Revolving Credit Termination Date. Please indicate your consent by signing below.
